crime.quote: which I call by the name of the murdered man look at the Murderer

victim.value: Murdered man who appears as ghost during trial
victim.quote: The murdered man at that time stood directly opposite the Jury-box

closed_world.quote: We retired to consider, at seven minutes before ten at night

culprit_and_motive.value: The defendant on trial, motive unclear from excerpt
culprit_and_motive.quote: As I gave in our verdict, "Guilty," the veil collapsed

resolution.value: Jury verdict of guilty, ghost disappears when justice served
resolution.quote: As I gave in our verdict, "Guilty," the veil collapsed, all was gone

investigator.value: Jury foreman who sees the murdered man's ghost
investigator.quote: BEFORE I WAS TAKEN, HE SOMEHOW GOT TO MY BEDSIDE IN THE NIGHT, WOKE ME, AND PUT A ROPE ROUND MY NECK

red_herring.value: Floating rumours about hooded lady, owl, Master B., ghost with round table, and impalpable Jackass serve as deliberate supernatural misdirection
red_herring.quote: I then recounted the floating rumours concerning the hooded lady, the owl, and Master B.

clue_fairness.value: The murdered man's supernatural presence and behavior during trial are shown to reader as narrator experiences them
clue_fairness.quote: The murdered man at that time stood directly opposite the Jury-box, on the other side of the Court.

social_world.value: Victorian judicial system with formal court hierarchy, jury structure, and press coverage of criminal proceedings
social_world.quote: The idiotic vestryman and his two parochial parasites gave us so much trouble

alibi.value: Murderer's claim of supernatural visitation before arrest serves as metaphysical alibi or explanation for his doom
alibi.quote: BEFORE I WAS TAKEN, HE SOMEHOW GOT TO MY BEDSIDE IN THE NIGHT, WOKE ME, AND PUT A ROPE ROUND MY NECK.

reveal_mechanic.value: Supernatural revelation through murdered victim's ghostly presence dissolving when justice is served
reveal_mechanic.quote: As I gave in our verdict, "Guilty," the veil collapsed, all was gone, and his place was empty.

media_and_audience.value: Press dismisses murderer's supernatural claims as rambling incoherence, contrasting with narrator's true experience
media_and_audience.quote: described in the leading newspapers of the following day as "a few rambling, incoherent, and half-audible words"

investigator_wound.value: Juror-narrator's supernatural sensitivity makes him uniquely burdened with seeing the murdered man's ghost throughout trial
investigator_wound.quote: Again and again I wondered, "Why does he not?" But he never did.

_meta.title: ebook charles dickens three ghost stories
